name: skill handles a deleted file in the diff by emitting an entry with after equal to empty string
command:
mkdir -p pr && printf 'diff --git a/x.js b/x.js
deleted file mode 100644
--- a/x.js
+++ /dev/null
@@ -1,1 +0,0 @@
-eval(s)
' > pr/diff.patch && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/skills/pr-to-eval-dataset/extract.sh" --diff pr/diff.patch --emit dataset --out dataset.jsonl 2>err.txt && grep -q '"after":""' dataset.jsonl && grep -q '"deleted":true' dataset.jsonl && echo ok 1>&2
